task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Reports section of OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR Reports menu is expanded or the Reports dashboard is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the correct appointment report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report interface titled 'Appointments Report', 'Patient Appointments', or 'Appointments' is open.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the date range for the current month and selected all providers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Date input fields show the start date as the 1st of the current month and the end date as today's date (in YYYY-MM-DD format). The provider filter is set to 'All', 'All Providers', or left unfiltered to include everyone.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the report generation process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a 'Submit', 'Generate', or 'Search' button, or the screen shows the page loading the report results.

task_completion.description: The generated appointment report is displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or list containing appointment records is visible within the OpenEMR interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenEMR web interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenEMR web application UI (menus, buttons, forms), rather than terminal commands, database queries, or API clients.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is displayed within the standard OpenEMR layout and browser window, not in a text editor, local file, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the application to generate the report rather than bypassing the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows the parameter selection screen prior to the final report being displayed, indicating genuine generation rather than loading a pre-saved static URL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In OpenEMR, the appointment report is typically located under Reports > Visits > Appointments. Valid report names include 'Appointments Report', 'Patient Appointments', and 'Appointments'. The system's default date format is YYYY-MM-DD. The report must cover the 1st of the current month to today's date.
